/usr/lib/ccache/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/wfrecorderplugin.dir/link.d  -o WfRecorder/libwfrecorderplugin.so CMakeFiles/wfrecorderplugin.dir/wfrecorderplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wfrecorderplugin.dir/wfrecorderplugin_WfRecorderPlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wfrecorderplugin.dir/wfrecorderplugin_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wfrecorderplugin.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_WfRecorder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/wfrecorderplugin.dir/wfrecorder.cpp.o  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
